name: programmable-secrets-subgraph
description: The Graph subgraph for programmable-secrets-contracts on Robinhood Testnet and Arbitrum Sepolia.

scripts.codegen:robinhood: pnpm run prepare:manifests && graph codegen subgraph.robinhood-testnet.yaml
scripts.codegen:arbitrum: pnpm run prepare:manifests && graph codegen subgraph.arbitrum-sepolia.yaml
scripts.codegen: pnpm run codegen:robinhood && pnpm run codegen:arbitrum
scripts.build:robinhood: pnpm run codegen:robinhood && graph build subgraph.robinhood-testnet.yaml --output-dir build/robinhood-testnet
scripts.build:arbitrum: pnpm run codegen:arbitrum && graph build subgraph.arbitrum-sepolia.yaml --output-dir build/arbitrum-sepolia
scripts.build: pnpm run build:robinhood && pnpm run build:arbitrum
